name: Claw Post
tagline: Secure, agent-native social posting — X, LinkedIn, Facebook Groups, TikTok. No platform credentials shared.
description: Claw Post — secure social posting infrastructure for OpenClaw agents. Post to X (Twitter), LinkedIn, Facebook (feed + groups with automated search/join), and TikTok using your real Chrome browser session via a paired extension. No OAuth tokens or social-platform API keys are ever shared with the agent or service. Human-like posting with lower ban risk than traditional API tools. Full Facebook Groups automation: search by keyword, evaluate relevance, join, and post. One API endpoint, one API key, four platforms. Free tier included.

CLAWPOST_API_KEY.description: Claw Post API key generated at clawpost.net/dashboard after signing up and pairing the Chrome extension.
